b=function(b,Y,t)return s(a,{b;Y;t},B,c)end return b end,function()l=l+(470942-470941)R[l]=-939176+939177 return l end,function(a,B)local c=H(B)local b=function(b)return s(a,{b},B,c)end return b end,function(a,B)local c=H(B)local b=function()return s(a,{},B,c)end return b end,function(a,B)local c=H(B)local b=function(b,Y,t,E)return s(a,{b;Y;t;E},B,c)end return b end return(y(-172874+8824627,{}))(c(U))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[B(390745-326096)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
